&CORE
dt = -100.0       ! invalid negative timestep
rnday = -5.0      ! invalid negative run time
ihfskip = 100     ! not divisible by nspool
nhot = 1          ! hotstart enabled
/

&OPT
ics = 2           ! spherical coordinates
slam0 = 0.0       ! not centered on domain
sfea0 = 0.0       ! not centered on domain
nws = 2           ! wind forcing
wtiminc = 50.0    ! less than dt
h0 = -0.1         ! invalid negative
nramp = 1         ! ramp enabled
dramp = 0.0       ! zero ramp duration
itur = 3          ! 3D turbulence in 2D setup
/

&SCHOUT
nspool = 7        ! prime number - won't divide evenly into ihfskip
iof_hydro(1) = 1
/
